content.title: Project
description: The Projects section contains multiple workspaces. Within this section, users can create, search, sort, refresh, or delete projects.
Navigate to the Projects section and click the New Project button.

subdescription: Enter the Project Name and Description.
Add relevant Tags by typing and pressing Enter ro Comma after each tag.
Click New Project to save, or Cancel to discard.
Once created, click the project card to access or manage its associated workspaces.

description: Use the Search Projects box to quickly find an existing project by its name.
Matching projects will be displayed as you type.

subdescription: Click “Apply” to save the changes or “Clear” to reset the selected options.

description: Click the Refresh icon to reload the latest list of projects.
Click the Take a Tour icon to view an overview of the Projects page and its features.
In the Projects section, locate the desired project card.
Click the three-dot menu on the project card and select Delete Project.
In the confirmation dialog, click Delete to permanently remove the project, or Cancel to discard the action.
